metadata.name: ww-input-range
metadata.description: A form-integrated numeric range slider (native HTML <input type="range">) that lets the user pick a value between a configurable min and max with a given step. Supports an optional tooltip that displays the current value, debounced change events, and form validation via the parent ww-form-container.
features: Native HTML range input with configurable min, max, and step
Optional tooltip displaying the current value
Built-in debounce for change events with configurable delay
Required-field support integrated with ww-form-container validation
Real-time two-way data binding via the exposed 'value' variable
Customizable track, active range, selector, and tooltip styling
Does not support non-linear or logarithmic scales
Does not support custom validation formulas (use form-level validation instead)

properties.name: value
properties.description: The initial numeric value of the slider when the element mounts. Should fall within [min, max].

properties.name: required
properties.description: Whether a value must be present for the parent form's validation to pass.

properties.name: min
properties.description: Minimum selectable value. Must be less than or equal to max.

properties.name: max
properties.description: Maximum selectable value. Must be greater than or equal to min.

properties.name: step
properties.description: Increment between selectable values. Must be greater than 0.

properties.name: debounce
properties.description: When true, the 'change' event is debounced by debounceDelay instead of firing on every slider move.

properties.name: debounceDelay
properties.description: Debounce delay applied to the 'change' event when debounce is enabled. Accepts values in ms (e.g. '500ms'). Inactive when debounce is false.

properties.name: isTooltip
properties.description: When true, displays a tooltip above the slider thumb showing the current value.

properties.name: globalStyle
properties.description: Visual styling of the slider (track, selector/thumb, tooltip). Object property matching the `globalStyle` group in ww-config.js. Responsive and supports states/classes.

properties.name: fontSize
properties.description: Font size of the tooltip value. Units: px, em, rem. Only visible when isTooltip is true. Inactive when isTooltip is false.

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.description: Font family of the tooltip value. Only visible when isTooltip is true. Inactive when isTooltip is false.

properties.name: useActiveRangeBackground
properties.description: When true, enables a distinct color for the filled portion of the track (between min and the current value).

properties.name: rangeBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of the slider track.

properties.name: activeRangeBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of the filled portion of the track. Only visible when useActiveRangeBackground is true. Inactive when globalStyle.useActiveRangeBackground is false.

properties.name: selectorBorderColor
properties.description: Border color of the slider selector (thumb).

properties.name: selectorBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of the slider selector (thumb).

properties.name: tooltipBackground
properties.description: Background color of the tooltip. Only visible when isTooltip is true. Inactive when isTooltip is false.

properties.name: tooltipTextColor
properties.description: Text color of the tooltip value. Only visible when isTooltip is true. Inactive when isTooltip is false.

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when the user changes the slider value. Respects the debounce/debounceDelay settings.

events.name: initValueChange
events.description: Triggered when the 'value' property changes programmatically (not from user interaction).

variables.name: value
variables.description: Current numeric value of the slider. Updates on user interaction (respecting debounce) or programmatic changes to the initial value.

specifications: min must be less than or equal to max; step must be strictly greater than 0.
The initial 'value' should fall within [min, max] — out-of-range values will be clamped by the browser.
When the slider is used inside a ww-form-container, expose its value to the form via the parent's field tracking rather than storing it in a separate variable.
Debounce delays the change event firing. Set debounce to true and debounceDelay to the desired delay (e.g. '500ms').
Use debounce with debounceDelay for auto-saving, searching scenarios or when the 'change' workflow performs expensive work (API calls, heavy computations) to avoid firing on every changes.
The isTooltip, selector, and range styling properties are purely visual and do not affect form behavior.
